tasks.description: Database schema for property, propertyMember, propertyInvite tables
steps: property table exists with id, name, slug, address, imageUrl, currency, createdAt, updatedAt
propertyMember table exists with id, propertyId, userId, role, createdAt
propertyInvite table exists with id, propertyId, email, invitedBy, createdAt, expiresAt

tasks.description: Database schema for project, costItem, logEntry, document tables
steps: project table exists with id, propertyId, name, description, status, estimatedCost, estimatedTime, createdAt, updatedAt
costItem table exists with id, projectId, name, estimatedCost, actualCost, createdAt, updatedAt
logEntry table exists with id, projectId, content, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
document table exists with id, projectId, name, url, key, mimeType, size, uploadedBy, createdAt

tasks.description: Database schema for contact and projectContact tables
steps: contact table exists with id, propertyId, companyName, personName, phone, email, notes, createdAt, updatedAt
projectContact table exists with id, projectId, contactId, createdAt

tasks.description: Database schema for quote, quoteFile, quoteComment tables
steps: quote table exists with id, projectId, contactId, description, value, expiresAt, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
quoteFile table exists with id, quoteId, name, url, key, mimeType, size, uploadedBy, createdAt
quoteComment table exists with id, quoteId, content, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
status enum includes: pending, accepted, rejected, expired

tasks.description: Database schema for invoice and invoiceFile tables
steps: invoice table exists with id, projectId, quoteId, contactId, description, amount, paidAt, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
invoiceFile table exists with id, invoiceId, name, url, key, mimeType, size, uploadedBy, createdAt

tasks.description: Drizzle relations defined using RQB v2 API
steps: property has relations: members, invites, projects, contacts
project has relations: property, costItems, logEntries, documents, projectContacts, quotes, invoices
quote has relations: project, contact, createdByUser, files, comments, invoices
invoice has relations: project, quote, contact, createdByUser, files
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: User can create a property with name, currency, optional address/photo
steps: Action validates input with Effect Schema
Action creates property with auto-generated slug
Slug is URL-safe (lowercase, dashes, no special chars)
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: Property slug is unique per user and auto-generated
steps: Uniqueness checked against user's existing properties

tasks.description: User can edit and delete property
steps: Delete cascades to all child records
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: Property photo uploads to S3
steps: get-upload-url-action.ts returns signed URL for property photos

tasks.description: Active property slug stored in localStorage and synced to cookie
steps: get-active-property.ts reads cookie, validates, returns property
use-active-property.ts hook syncs localStorage to cookie on mount
set-active-property.ts updates both localStorage and cookie
Server reads cookie via cookies() from next/headers

tasks.description: Owner can invite user by email
steps: Sends invite email via Resend service
Email contains link to accept invite
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: Invited user accepts invite and joins property
steps: Sets localStorage slug for new property

tasks.description: Owner can remove members and members can leave
steps: Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: User can create, edit, delete projects
steps: Status options: idea, planning, in_progress, done, on_hold
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: Project queries return data for pages
steps: queries.ts in lib/core/project/ exports getProjects, getProject
getProject returns single project with related data

tasks.description: User can manage cost items on projects
steps: create-cost-item-action.ts adds item with name, estimated cost
Run pnpm tsc without type errors

tasks.description: User can manage log entries on projects
User can upload and manage documents on projects
steps: save-document-action.ts stores document reference after upload
delete-document-action.ts removes document record and S3 object
Supports images, PDFs, common document formats

tasks.description: User can manage contacts scoped to property
steps: create-contact-action.ts creates contact with company, person, phone, email, notes
delete-contact-action.ts removes contact and project links

tasks.description: User can link/unlink contacts to projects
User can create and manage quotes on projects
steps: create-quote-action.ts creates quote with description, value, expiry
delete-quote-action.ts removes quote and related files/comments

tasks.description: User can upload files and add comments to quotes
Accepted quotes contribute to project estimated cost
steps: Project summary query sums accepted quote values
Estimated cost = cost item estimates + accepted quote values

tasks.description: User can create and manage invoices on projects
steps: create-invoice-action.ts creates invoice with description, amount
delete-invoice-action.ts removes invoice and related files

tasks.description: User can upload files to invoices
Paid invoices contribute to project actual cost
steps: Project summary query sums paid invoice amounts
Actual cost = cost item actuals + paid invoice amounts

tasks.description: Onboarding page for first-time users
steps: Uses Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic

tasks.description: Dashboard page shows property overview
steps: Displays total estimated vs actual cost
Project cards show name, status, cost summary
Uses Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic

tasks.description: Project detail page with tabs/sections
steps: Sections for: cost items, log entries, documents, contacts, quotes, invoices
Uses Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic

tasks.description: Contacts page lists property contacts
steps: Lists all contacts for active property
Uses Suspense + Content pattern with force-dynamic

tasks.description: Settings page with property management
steps: Property section: edit name, slug, address, photo, currency

tasks.description: Property switcher in settings dropdown
steps: Clicking property updates localStorage and reloads

tasks.description: Unit tests for core domain functions
Data isolation verified
steps: Test that user A cannot access user B's property
Test that queries filter by property membership

tasks.description: Effect spans added to all operations
Domain errors defined in lib/core/errors/index.ts

patterns: Page pattern: Suspense + Content with force-dynamic
